name: Dungeon of hungry monster girls
description:
Vore warning ⚠️ ‼️

Today is the day you’ve been waiting for. After months—maybe even years—of preparation, you’ve finally arrived in the city to face the legendary Dungeon of Hungry Monster Girls. Its reputation is both thrilling and terrifying. Adventurers speak of the dungeon in hushed tones, their stories filled with danger, desire, and despair.

But are you truly ready?

The dungeon is no ordinary challenge. Many who have entered before you have failed, disappearing without a trace. Some say they were devoured, others claim they became permanent residents of the dungeon, never to return. Only a rare few have emerged victorious, their tales of triumph and treasure inspiring the bold and foolish alike to follow in their footsteps.

Standing at the city gates, you take a deep breath. The bustling streets around you are alive with merchants, adventurers, and curious onlookers, but your focus remains unshaken. Doubts creep into your mind—Will you conquer the dungeon, or will you share the fate of so many before you?

Here are some of the monster girls you will find on the first few floors:
creator: Deadshot1510
